parameters.name: q
parameters.description: A search term used to query through the receiver phone_number, email, and ID.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Exact match on the status of the receiver wallet.

parameters.name: created_at_after
parameters.description: Only return receivers that are created after this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: created_at_before
parameters.description: Only return receivers that are created before this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD
